summary: Build a UK-focused company formation website.

existing_features.title: Create a UK-focused company formation marketing website with core informational pages: Home, Packages/Pricing, How It Works, FAQs, Contact, and Legal pages (Privacy Policy and Terms of Service placeholders).

Implement a multi-step UK company formation wizard that collects the typical incorporation details: company name(s) preferences, company type (e.g., private limited by shares), registered office address option, director details, shareholders/share allocation, PSC details, SIC codes, and contact email/phone.
Add package selection (e.g., Basic/Standard/Premium) with clear inclusions and pricing, and connect the selected package into the formation wizard and final submission payload.
Add a simple order confirmation experience: after successful submission, show a confirmation page with a unique reference ID and a summary of what was submitted.
Add an internal admin view that is accessible only to authenticated users (Internet Identity) to review the list of submitted formation orders and view order details.

Apply a coherent, professional UK corporate visual theme (distinct style) across all pages and flows, including typography, spacing, and reusable UI patterns (cards, steps, forms). Do not use a blue & purple color scheme.
Add generated static visual assets (logo and hero illustration) to the frontend and use them in the header and Home hero section.
Generate a complete downloadable archive containing all project source code, including frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Motoko), configuration files, and project metadata.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a UK company formation website (core site for forming UK companies).
Create backend data models and APIs to accept, validate, and persist formation order submissions, and to list submitted orders for later review.
